report.summary: Cycle 4 standup: Deploy gap RESOLVED (commit 5dad971). Working tree down to 9 files from 452. 607 published slugs (+16 since v3), 1,240 page.tsx on disk, 2 items in PUBLISH_QUEUE ready. 103 missing page.tsx gap unchanged. 16 agent cycles today so far.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V3 STANDUP: Published slugs 591→607 (+16, committed in 5dad971). Page.tsx stable at 1,240. Uncommitted files 452→9 (massive cleanup via commit). PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items (stablecoin payments + omnichain DeFi guides from build-v2 cycle).

DEPLOY STATUS CHANGE: P0 deploy blocker from v1-v3 is RESOLVED. Commit 5dad971 landed today with admin page manager, learn guides, metadata fixes. If Vercel auto-deploy is connected, all 607 published slugs should now be indexable.

CONTENT VELOCITY TODAY: 4 learn guides created across 2 build cycles (KYA, Sui Privacy, Stablecoin Payments Infra, Omnichain DeFi). 2 pages promoted from queue. 5 metadata fixes. 2 social cards. 4 tweet drafts. Strong output day.

SEO IMPACT: With deploy landed, the 5 layout.tsx metadata fixes, 2 new published guides, and 16 newly published slugs are now visible to Google. Indexing debt from 7-day gap should begin resolving. Monitor GSC coverage in 48-72h.
MARKET DATA: Egress blocked to CoinGecko/Alternative.me. Last known: BTC $68,688 (+1.94%), ETH $2,133 (+3.75%), SOL $83.86 (+1.08%), F&G 8 (Extreme Fear).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 4th standup of Apr 1. All 6 agent types have run today: standup ×4 (this), build ×2, publish ×2, design ×3, community ×2, eod ×3. Total: 16 agent cycles today (this is the 16th).

V3 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Emergency deploy — RESOLVED. Commit 5dad971 landed. (2) Q1 market recap content — NOT STARTED (build cycles pivoted to stablecoin payments + omnichain DeFi). (3) Run full 6-agent rotation — DONE repeatedly.
RESOLVED THIS CYCLE: P0 deploy gap is closed. Working tree cleaned from 452→9 uncommitted files. 607 slugs now in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 591).

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: P1 — 103 missing page.tsx for published slugs (17% gap, unchanged). P2 — 147 TS errors (stable, non-blocking). P3 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. P3 — defi-yields no stale fallback.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items ready (stablecoin-payments-infrastructure-guide-2026, omnichain-defi-unified-liquidity-guide-2026). Both scaffolded with full SEO + FAQ schemas in build-v2 cycle.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — PROMOTE 2 QUEUE ITEMS: Stablecoin Payments Infra and Omnichain DeFi guides are scaffolded, SEO-optimized, and sitting in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Move them to PUBLISHED_PAGES in next publish cycle — these are high-intent 2026 topics with search demand.

PRIORITY 2 — BATCH-SCAFFOLD 103 MISSING PAGE.TXX: 103 published slugs return noindex because they lack page.tsx. This is the biggest indexing surface unlock available. Delegate to page-scaffold + programmer for a batch run.

PRIORITY 3 — Q1 MARKET RECAP: BTC -24% YTD, ETH -60%, SOL -72%, longest extreme fear streak — Q1 recap content window still open but decaying. Next build cycle should produce this before search interest fades.

metrics.value: $1,166 (16 cycles: standup×4=$180, build×2=$466, publish×2=$110, design×3=$180, community×2=$82, eod×3=$189)
